channel.title: Engineering on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Engineering on Junho Lee

item.title: What Actually Improves Claude Code Performance: Configuration and Architecture
item.description: Keeping Claude Code in a minimal state, optimizing reasoning settings to reduce hallucinations, and building an architecture-first development environment — a practical take on what actually moves the needle.

item.title: macshot: A Native macOS Tool Emerging as an Alternative to Paid Apps
item.description: A look at macshot, a native open-source macOS screenshot and screen recording tool that delivers powerful features without the subscription burden.
